title: SlashNouveau - Ars Nouveau & SlashBlade
description: Add functionality to trigger Ars Nouveau magic using SlashBlade.
body:
**SlashNouveau** is an integration addon for **SlashBlade** and **Ars Nouveau**.

**This mod requires** **[CastLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/castlib), [ArsCurios](https://modrinth.com/mod/arscurios)**

 

### **Highlights**

*   **Ars Nouveau** spells can be triggered by **SlashBlade projectiles**.
*   Spells activated via **SlashNouveau** consume **SlashBlade's ProudSoul** instead of **Ars Nouveau's mana**.
*   **SlashBlade's ProudSoul** regenerates up to a certain limit using **Ars Nouveau's mana**.  
  _⚠️This limit is determined by the **Refine** value of the **SlashBlade.**_
*   Uses **Ars Nouveau's SpellBook** for activation, allowing seamless casting of up to **10 different spells**.
*   **Quick selection** of the **SpellBook** is supported even in **dedicated slots**.
*   For **safety reasons**, spells do **not activate during melee attacks**.

### **How to Use**

1.  Prepare a **SlashBlade** that can fire **projectiles**.
2.  Create a **spell** using **Ars Nouveau's SpellBook**.
3.  Place the **SpellBook** into the dedicated **Curios slot**.
4.  Use the **quick select shortcut key** to choose a **spell** from the **SpellBook**.
5.  When the **SlashBlade's projectile** hits an **entity**, the **spell** will be **activated**.

 

### **Note**

*   Make sure to place the **SpellBook** in the dedicated **Curios slot**.
*   To increase the **maximum limit** of **natural ProudSoul regeneration**, you need to raise the **Refine value** of the **SlashBlade**.
*   **Spells** do **not activate** on **blocks** when using **SlashNouveau**.

### **Config**

*   `ProudSoulConsume (Default: 30)`  
         **Mana cost** when casting magic with **SlashBlade's projectile**.
*   `ProudSoulLimitByRefine (Default: 200)`  
         **Maximum value** for **natural ProudSoul recovery** = **Refine × this value**
*   `SpellBookSlots`  
         Slots for the **SpellBook**. (**Do not edit**)
